title: Simple Past 2
description: Learn past tense using 上週 / 上個週末.

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu kàn le diàn yǐng.
steps.english_hint: I watched a movie last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã xem một bộ phim vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันดูหนังเมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mǎi le xīn yī fú.
steps.english_hint: I bought new clothes last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã mua quần áo mới vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันซื้อเสื้อผ้าใหม่เมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว
hints.id: Saya membeli baju baru minggu lalu.

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mò qù le hǎi biān.
steps.english_hint: I went to the beach last weekend.

hints.vi: Tôi đã đi biển vào cuối tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันไปทะเลเมื่อสุดสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว
hints.id: Saya pergi ke pantai akhir pekan lalu.

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mò yùn dòng le.

hints.vi: Tôi đã tập thể dục vào cuối tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันออกกำลังกายเมื่อสุดสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu xiě le bào gào.
steps.english_hint: I wrote a report last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã viết một báo cáo vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันเขียนรายงานเมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu zhǔ le xīn de liào lǐ.
steps.english_hint: I cooked a new dish last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã nấu một món ăn mới vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันทำอาหารจานใหม่เมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว
hints.id: Saya memasak hidangan baru minggu lalu.

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu wán le zhuō yóu.
steps.english_hint: I played board games last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã chơi trò chơi board game vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันเล่นบอร์ดเกมเมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว
hints.id: Saya bermain permainan papan minggu lalu.

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mò shuì de hěn duō.
steps.english_hint: I slept a lot last weekend.

hints.vi: Tôi đã ngủ rất nhiều vào cuối tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันนอนเยอะมากเมื่อสุดสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว
hints.id: Saya banyak tidur akhir pekan lalu.

encouragements.th: ทำได้ดีมาก!

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mǎi le lǐ wù.
steps.english_hint: I bought a gift last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã mua một món quà vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันซื้อของขวัญเมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว

steps.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu tīng le yí gè gù shì.
steps.english_hint: I listened to a story last week.

hints.vi: Tôi đã nghe một câu chuyện vào tuần trước.
hints.th: ฉันฟังเรื่องเล่าเมื่อสัปดาห์ที่แล้ว

review.summary: You practiced past tense for last week and last weekend.
